title: Silky Indian Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A umami-rich and silky Indian cabbage dish perfect for a solo dinner featuring caramelized cabbage leaves without eggs.
instructions: Slice the cabbage into large leaves and the onion into thin strips.
Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add crushed sukhni, stir for about 30 seconds.
Add chopped ginger garlic paste to the pan and sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add sliced onions and continue cooking until they turn translucent, about 5-7 minutes.
Fold in cabbage leaves one by one. Add turmeric powder and coriander powder. Cook for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the cabbage is tender but still has a crunch.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
